sources.content:
7. RETURNS AND REFUNDS

Our Return & Exchange Policy (version 2.1, incorporated by reference) governs returns, exchanges, and refunds. Key points:
- 60-day return window (90 days for VIP members)
- Free return shipping
- Products must be in unworn or lightly worn condition
- Certain items marked "Final Sale" are non-returnable

See full Return Policy at [link] for complete terms.

8. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

RETURN & EXCHANGE POLICY - Version 2.1
Effective: October 2023
Last Updated: January 2024

OUR PROMISE:
We want you to love your shoes. If they're not perfect, we make returns easy and free.

RETURN WINDOW:
- Standard: 60 days from delivery date (extended from 45 days)
- VIP members: 90 days
- Holiday purchases (Nov-Dec): Returns accepted until January 31st

**Can I return without a receipt?**
Yes! We can look up your order with email address or order number. Gift recipients can return for store credit.

**When will I get my refund?**
3-5 business days after we receive your return. You'll get email confirmation when refund processes. Bank may take additional 1-3 days to post to account.
Changes from v1.8: Extended window to 60 days, free return shipping, removed restocking fees, added partner drop-off locations, instant store credit option, exchange improvements.

RETURN & EXCHANGE POLICY - Version 1.8
Effective: March 2022 - September 2023
Status: SUPERSEDED - For reference only

RETURN POLICY:
Customers may return unworn, unwashed merchandise within 45 days of purchase date with original receipt and packaging. Shoes must have all original tags attached and be in resaleable condition.

Return Methods:
1. Mail returns: Customer pays return shipping ($8.95 flat rate)
2. In-store returns: Not available (online only business)

individual_results.question: Can I return shoes that I have already worn?
individual_results.expected_answer: No, shoes must be unused, with original box and no visible wear on the sole
individual_results.generated_answer: Yes! You can return shoes that you have already worn as long as they meet the conditions of being light wear (indoors or one short run), clean, and in resellable condition.

sources.content:
**What if shoes are defective?**
Contact us immediately with photos. We'll send replacement right away – no need to return defective pair first. Manufacturing defects covered 100%.

**I wore them once and they hurt. Can I return?**
Yes! We understand you need to test shoes. Light wear (indoors or one short run) is acceptable for returns. Just make sure they're clean and in resellable condition.

---

ARTICLE: SIZING & FIT
Category: Product Info | Updated: Jan 2024

EXCHANGES:
Wrong size? Wrong color? We'll cover shipping both ways for exchanges. New item ships before you return the original (we trust you!).

NO RESTOCKING FEES. EVER.

EXCLUSIONS (Very few):
- Items marked "Final Sale" at checkout (you'll see a warning)
- Shoes worn outdoors extensively (mud, significant scuffing, etc.)
- Items damaged beyond normal try-on wear

----------------------------------------
SECTION 4 — RETURNS
----------------------------------------

Return Window:
Customers may return products within 30 calendar days of delivery.

Holiday Extended Returns:
Orders placed between November 20 and December 24 may be returned until January 31.

Return Conditions:
- Shoes must be unworn.
- Original box must be included.
- No visible sole wear.
- Proof of purchase required.

RETURN & EXCHANGE POLICY - Version 1.8
Effective: March 2022 - September 2023
Status: SUPERSEDED - For reference only

RETURN POLICY:
Customers may return unworn, unwashed merchandise within 45 days of purchase date with original receipt and packaging. Shoes must have all original tags attached and be in resaleable condition.

Return Methods:
1. Mail returns: Customer pays return shipping ($8.95 flat rate)
2. In-store returns: Not available (online only business)

EXCLUSIONS:
- Sale items marked "Final Sale" (25% off or more) cannot be returned
- Clearance items (50% off or more) are final sale
- Custom or personalized footwear: No returns
- Items without original packaging: Reduced refund (30% restocking fee)

DEFECTIVE MERCHANDISE:
Manufacturing defects covered for 60 days. Customer must provide photos. Prepaid return label issued after review. Replacement shipped after defective item received (7-10 day process).

---

# SHIPPING QUICK REFERENCE

Free shipping threshold:
$120 USD (before tax).

Standard Shipping:
3–7 business days (U.S. mainland).

Peak Season Note:
November 15 – December 31 may experience delays.

---

# RETURNS QUICK REFERENCE

Return window:
30 days from delivery.

Holiday exception:
Returns allowed until January 31 for late November and December purchases.

Return shipping fee:
$7.50 unless exchange.

---

# WARRANTY QUICK REFERENCE

RETURN CONDITIONS:
✓ Shoes must be unworn or lightly worn (we get it - you need to test them!)
✓ Original packaging preferred but not required
✓ No receipt needed (we can look up your order with email)

HOW TO RETURN:

Option 1 - Free Mail Returns:
1. Log into your account > Orders > Select item > "Start Return"
2. Print prepaid return label (FREE - we cover shipping)
3. Drop off at any USPS, UPS, or FedEx location
4. Track your return online

**What is your return policy?**
60 days to return from delivery date (90 days for VIP members). Shoes must be unworn or lightly worn. We provide free return shipping.

**How do I start a return?**
1. Log into account > Orders
2. Select item > "Start Return"
3. Choose reason (helps us improve!)
4. Print prepaid return label  
5. Pack item securely (original box preferred but not required)
6. Drop off at USPS, UPS, or FedEx

Refund Processing:
- Refunds issued to original payment method within 10-14 business days
- Store credit option: Issued immediately upon receipt
- Return shipping costs are non-refundable

EXCHANGE POLICY:
Exchanges for different size or color accepted within 45-day window. Customer must pay shipping costs both ways ($8.95 each direction). Exchanges processed as return + new order.

**What about exchanges?**
We'll ship your exchange as soon as we receive your return – no need to wait for refund and reorder! Choose "Exchange" option when starting return.

**Can I return sale items?**
Yes, unless marked "Final Sale" at time of purchase. Final Sale items are clearly labeled and you'll see warning at checkout.

**Step 1: Know Your Foot Type**

*The Wet Test:*
Wet your foot, step on a paper bag or dark pavement, and look at your footprint:
- **Flat foot:** Full footprint (you probably overpronate)
- **Neutral arch:** Moderate curve on inside (neutral pronation)  
- **High arch:** Big gap between heel and forefoot (underpronation/supination)

**Step 2: Understand Pronation**

individual_results.question: What shoe is better for trail running?
individual_results.expected_answer: TerraGrip X2, which is designed for mud, gravel and mountain trails

sources.content:
**Step 3: Consider Your Running Style**

- **Road running:** Lightweight, cushioned shoes
- **Trail running:** Aggressive tread, stability features, toe protection  
- **Track/speed work:** Minimal cushioning, responsive, lightweight
- **Long distance:** Maximum cushioning, comfort over speed

**Step 4: Get the Right Fit**

Dr. Emily

**Step 2: Understand Pronation**

*Overpronation:* Foot rolls inward excessively – look for stability or motion-control shoes
*Neutral pronation:* Even foot roll – neutral/cushioned shoes work great
*Underpronation:* Foot rolls outward – need extra cushioning

**Step 3: Consider Your Running Style**

**Step 5: Test Before Buying**

Run around the store. Seriously. Walk, jog, test on different surfaces if possible. Many specialty running stores have treadmills – use them! Our return policy gives you 60 days to test them on actual runs (just keep them clean).

**Don't Fall for These Myths:**

❌ "Break-in period" – Running shoes should feel good from day one
❌ "More expensive = better" – Most important is fit for YOUR foot
❌ "I'll get used to it" – Discomfort means wrong shoe

**What if shoes are defective?**
Contact us immediately with photos. We'll send replacement right away – no need to return defective pair first. Manufacturing defects covered 100%.

**I wore them once and they hurt. Can I return?**
Yes! We understand you need to test shoes. Light wear (indoors or one short run) is acceptable for returns. Just make sure they're clean and in resellable condition.

---

ARTICLE: SIZING & FIT
Category: Product Info | Updated: Jan 2024

EXCHANGES:
Wrong size? Wrong color? We'll cover shipping both ways for exchanges. New item ships before you return the original (we trust you!).

NO RESTOCKING FEES. EVER.

EXCLUSIONS (Very few):
- Items marked "Final Sale" at checkout (you'll see a warning)
- Shoes worn outdoors extensively (mud, significant scuffing, etc.)
- Items damaged beyond normal try-on wear

**1. The Mileage Test (300-500 miles)**
Most running shoes have a lifespan of 300-500 miles. Keep a running log (pun intended) or use an app to track your mileage. If you run 20 miles per week, that's about 4-6 months.

**2. Sole Wear Pattern**
Flip your shoes over. See uneven wear? Bald spots on the outsole? That's your shoe telling you it's retirement time. The tread should be visible and even.

Fraud Prevention:
SprintStep reserves the right to request additional identity verification for high-value orders (above $500).

6. TRANSFERABILITY

Store credit is NON-TRANSFERABLE:
- Tied to your account (email address) and cannot be transferred to another person
- Cannot be sold, auctioned, or exchanged for cash
- Cannot be divided between multiple accounts
- Exception: If you close your account, credit can be transferred to new account with same name/email (contact customer service)

7. CASH VALUE & REDEMPTION

7. CASH VALUE & REDEMPTION

Store credit has NO CASH VALUE:
- Cannot be redeemed for cash or check
- Cannot be used at third-party retailers or partner stores (online use only)
- If account is closed, credit is forfeited (not refunded in cash)

8. SPECIAL CIRCUMSTANCES

Important Notes:
- Store credit applies to product cost only (not shipping or taxes, unless credit covers full order)
- Cannot be used to purchase gift cards
- Can be combined with promo codes, loyalty points, and other discounts
- Partial use allowed – unused portion remains in account

4. REFUNDS & EXCHANGES WITH STORE CREDIT

2. STORE CREDIT BALANCE & TRACKING

- Store credit balance visible in your account under "My Account > Store Credit"
- Email confirmation sent each time credit is issued or redeemed
- Minimum redeemable amount: $1.00 (no maximum)
- Balance never expires (see Expiration section below)

3. HOW TO USE STORE CREDIT

7. RETURNS AND REFUNDS

tions

6. Returns Policy
Return Window: 30 calendar days from delivery date.
Return Conditions: - Shoes must be unworn - Original box required - Proof of
purchase mandatory
Non-Returnable Items: - Final Sale products - Gift cards - Customized or per-
sonalized shoes
Refund Timeline: - 5–10 business days after warehouse inspection
Return Authorization Code Required: RA-SS-XXXX
7. Exchanges

Shipping Label Requirements:
- Electronic manifest submission required by 2:00 PM daily
- USPS-approved label format (4x6 thermal labels)
- Intelligent Mail Barcode (IMB) required on all labels
- Return address and customer service contact mandatory

Packaging Standards:
- Company responsible for packaging integrity
- Boxes must meet USPS dimensional standards
- Fragile items: Additional "Fragile" sticker recommended (provided by USPS)

TRACKING & VISIBILITY:

DEFECTIVE ITEMS:
Manufacturing defect? We'll replace or refund immediately - no need to return first. Contact customer service with photos. We stand behind quality 100%.

GIFT RETURNS:
Gift recipient can return for store credit without original receipt. Just need order number or packing slip.

QUESTIONS?
Chat with us 24/7 or email returns@athleticfootwear.com
Average response time: Under 2 hours

RETURN CONDITIONS:
✓ Shoes must be unworn or lightly worn (we get it - you need to test them!)
✓ Original packaging preferred but not required
✓ No receipt needed (we can look up your order with email)

HOW TO RETURN:

Option 1 - Free Mail Returns:
1. Log into your account > Orders > Select item > "Start Return"
2. Print prepaid return label (FREE - we cover shipping)
3. Drop off at any USPS, UPS, or FedEx location
4. Track your return online

sources.content:
**What about exchanges?**
We'll ship your exchange as soon as we receive your return – no need to wait for refund and reorder! Choose "Exchange" option when starting return.

**Can I return sale items?**
Yes, unless marked "Final Sale" at time of purchase. Final Sale items are clearly labeled and you'll see warning at checkout.

Examples of fraud/abuse:
- Creating multiple accounts to use single-use codes multiple times
- Using bots or automated tools to exploit promotions
- Publicly sharing single-use codes intended for specific recipients
- Reselling promotional products for profit
- False identity or payment information

RETURNS & EXCHANGES ON PROMOTIONAL ORDERS:

6. TRANSFERABILITY

Store credit is NON-TRANSFERABLE:
- Tied to your account (email address) and cannot be transferred to another person
- Cannot be sold, auctioned, or exchanged for cash
- Cannot be divided between multiple accounts
- Exception: If you close your account, credit can be transferred to new account with same name/email (contact customer service)

7. CASH VALUE & REDEMPTION

a) Returns
   - When processing a return, you may choose store credit instead of refund to original payment method
   - Benefit: Store credit is issued INSTANTLY (no waiting for bank processing)
   - Bonus: 5% extra credit (e.g., $100 return = $105 store credit)
   - See Return Policy for eligibility requirements

b) Exchanges
   - If exchanged item is lower in price than original, difference issued as store credit
   - Example: Original purchase $120, exchange item $100 → $20 store credit

Important Notes:
- Store credit applies to product cost only (not shipping or taxes, unless credit covers full order)
- Cannot be used to purchase gift cards
- Can be combined with promo codes, loyalty points, and other discounts
- Partial use allowed – unused portion remains in account

4. REFUNDS & EXCHANGES WITH STORE CREDIT
